title: When one person collapses a group in a board , it sticks for everyone
excerpt:

posts.author: Manal_naqvi (manal naqvi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When one user collapses a group on a board, the collapsed state should apply to all users, not just the individual who made the change. Group collapse/expand behavior should persist globally so everyone sees the same board structure.

What are you trying to achieve

Ensure that when a group is collapsed on a board, it remains collapsed for all users, creating a consistent and shared board view for everyone.
